[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010110 3
1 1111010 5
2 1110000 3
3 1001111 5
4 0100000 1
5 0000010 1
6 1110101 5
7 0001010 2

01 10 0001010 2 match 7
12 21 0111111 6
23 32 1101111 6
34 43 0100010 2

56 65 1110101 5 match 6
67 76 1101100 4
70 07 1101100 4

13 31 1010000 2

60 06 0000000 a
71 17 1100110 4

47 74 0010100 2
50 05 1110101 5 match 6
61 16 0001010 2 match 7
72 27 1011001 4

15 51 1111111 a

37 73 0110110 4
